description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle operator was maneuvering the vehicle in manual mode out of a parallel parking spot on the right side curb of 46th Avenue in
 San Francisco, when the roof-mounted sensor pod on the rear passenger side of the vehicle made contact with a tree branch. The sensor pod 
on the Zoox vehicle sustained damage. There were no reported injuries and police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
